name: Agile
effect: After this fighter makes an attack with this weapon, they may make a free Disengage action.

name: Agonising
effect: On a critical hit, halve the target’s Move characteristic (round up) until the end of its next activation.

name: Arc
effect: After resolving this attack, one other visible enemy within 3" of the target suffers damage equal to a hit damage.

name: Assault
effect: This attack gains +1 attack dice at half range.

name: Balanced
effect: You may change one miss to a hit after rolling an attack with this weapon.

name: Beam
effect: When selecting a target for this weapon, draw a straight line up to the weapons max range. All Fighers underneath that line (friend and foe) are a target for the attack. Make a single attack for all targets determining the damage individually.

name: Blast
effect: For the next attack with this weapon, if the attack has at least one hit or crit, all fighters (friend and foe) within 2" of the target suffer damage equal to a hit damage.

name: Brutal
effect: After an attack roll with this weapon, upgrade one hit to a crit.

name: Concussive
effect: After performing an attack with this weapon, if at least one hit or crit is scored, the target is shoved 3" directly away from the attacker. If the target hits a piece of terrain or another model, they stop and immediately suffer 1 damage.

name: Heavy
effect: This weapon cannot be fired if the Fighter has moved more than 2" this turn.

name: Lethal
effect: If an attack with this weapon would normally crit on a 6, it now also crits on a 5.

name: Limited(1)
effect: This item can only be used once per battle. The item is available again the next battle.

name: Melta
effect: When performing an attack with this weapon against a target within half the weapon's maximum range, increase this weapon's Damage characteristic by +1/+1.

name: Parry
effect: When this fighter is targeted in melee, increase their defense by 1.

name: Piercing
effect: For the next attack with this weapon, subtract 2 from the target’s Defence to a minimun of 3.

name: Pistol
effect: Pistols are one-handed weapons. When in melee range (0-3) attacks with this weapon use Ballistic Skill.

name: Poison
effect: If an attack with this weapon did at least one point of damage, roll X dice and do 1 damage to the same target for each 4-5 and X damage for each 6.

name: Rad
effect: After an attack with this weapon that does damage, the target suffers -1 Def until the end of the battle.

name: Rapid Fire
effect: For the rest of the turn attacks with this weapon gain +1 attack dice.

name: Reliable
effect: If this attack rolls no hits or crits, change one miss to a hit.

name: Relentless
effect: This fighter may immediately make a bonus 3" move action.

name: Rending
effect: On a critical hit, increase the damage of all other hits from this attack by +1.

name: Scope
effect: This attack ignores the +1 cover bonus.

name: Shock
effect: After an attack with this weapon does damage, remove an action from the enemy fighter.

name: Shred
effect: After resolving an attack with this weapon, target suffers -1 Defense until the end of the round.

name: Silent
effect: Making this attack does not trigger reactions or abilities from enemy fighters.

name: Spread
effect: This attack may target up to two targets within 1" of each other.

name: Stowed
effect: This weapon does not require a hand to carry or use.

name: Supercharge
effect: Choose to increase damage by +1/+1; if you miss, fighter takes damage equal to a crit.

name: Two-Handed
effect: This weapon occupies both hand slots.

name: Unwieldy
effect: This fighter cannot use this weapon to make Reactions.

name: Warp
effect: Ignore line of sight when selecting a target with this weapon.

name: Pinning
effect: Attacks with this weapon give a -1 M and -1 BS to the target fighter until the end of that the target fighters next activation.
